sglang.author: jeffdn
sglang.bodyExcerpt:

Currently, CI runs tests and formatting, but does not lint. This PR updates the GH actions to also run cargo clippy and fail if issues are found.

sglang.title: [router] introduce prefill response draining for http compliance
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR fixes a critical HTTP/1.1 compliance violation in the prefill-decode (PD) router that was causing connection errors under high concurrency.
Previously, when return_logprob=false, the router used a fire-and-forget approach with tokio::spawn that would close HTTP connections before
